title: Klaviyo vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your business best.
h1: Klaviyo vs Constant Contact: Complete Comparison
intro: Klaviyo and Constant Contact are two established email marketing platforms, but they serve different markets and use cases. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce businesses seeking advanced automation and predictive analytics, while Constant Contact targets nonprofits and local businesses with straightforward, affordable tools. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Predictive analytics, advanced segmentation, flows, SMS, reviews
comparison_table.tool_b: Event management, social media ads, SMS, list building, simplicity

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store and need advanced automation, predictive analytics, and product review integrations
You want to start free and scale up with a robust feature set as your business grows
You use Shopify or WooCommerce and need deep platform integrations
choose_b_if: You're a small nonprofit or local business with a tight budget starting at just $12/month
You prioritize simplicity and ease of use over advanced automation features
You need event management and social media advertising integrated into your email platform

faq.q: Is Klaviyo better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is better for e-commerce businesses requiring advanced automation and analytics, earning higher ratings (4.6 vs 4.0 on G2). However, Constant Contact is better for nonprofits and small local businesses seeking simplicity and affordability without complex features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at just $12/month with no free tier, making it initially cheaper. Klaviyo offers a free tier for up to 500 contacts, but paid plans begin at $45/month. For small lists, Klaviyo's free option can be more economical; for larger lists, Constant Contact may be more budget-friendly.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email templates, making migration possible. Most users can transfer their data within a few hours, though you'll need to manually recreate complex automation workflows in Klaviyo. Consider timing your migration to avoid disrupting active campaigns.
